description: Whatever you think of Black Friday consumerism, it is here to stay – at least for now. I am against anything that encourages people to use up resources they do not need or encourages them to go into unnecessary debt. If you are the sort of person who is tempted by a sale. Check out this post with lots of advice on how to make the most of it and avoid unnecessary bargains.
